news.title: ‘Operation Red Card:’ Over 150 human trafficking, child exploitation arrests made in metro Atlanta
news.summary: During the FIFA World Cup activities in the metro Atlanta in June and July, federal officials said more than 150 people were arrested in connection to human trafficking and child exploitation charges.

news.title: Gwinnett bakery staffed by adults with special needs still fighting to survive
news.summary: A Gwinnett County nonprofit bakery that employs 47 adults with special needs came within a week of missing payroll this summer, and more than $43,000 in donations has bought it time but not a way out.

news.title: Deputies arrest blood-covered suspect after deadly stabbing on porch of Paulding County home
news.summary: When deputies arrived, they found a man standing on the back porch covered in blood and ordered him off the porch.

news.title: Metro Atlanta man points gun at other driver during road rage incident, yelling about politics
news.summary: A Cobb County man is in jail without bond after aiming a gun at a driver and passenger in traffic with him during a road rage incident.

news.title: Bodycam: Gwinnett officer stops alleged wrong-way DUI driver on I-85 with PIT maneuver
news.summary: Newly released body camera video shows the moment a Gwinnett County police sergeant stopped an alleged drunk driver who was traveling the wrong way on Interstate 85 on the Fourth of July.

news.title: Nearly 500 pounds of meth seized in metro Atlanta bust
news.summary: Three suspects face federal drug conspiracy charges after law enforcement officers seized nearly 500 pounds of methamphetamine across metro Atlanta.

news.title: 153 arrested in targeted operation during World Cup Atlanta
news.summary: A joint law enforcement operation targeting human trafficking and child sexual exploitation during metro Atlanta World Cup events resulted in 153 criminal arrests and the rescue of 54 victims, officia

news.title: Man charged with murder after 30-year-old found stabbed to death in DeKalb County front yard
news.summary: DeKalb County Police said a man is in custody in the stabbing death of 30-year-old Kenyon Jefferies, which occurred on July 3.

news.title: 2 suspects arrested, 1 wanted after hotel car break-ins ends with chase on I-20
news.summary: Conyers officers are investigating over a dozen car break-ins at three hotels.

news.title: 2 arrested, 1 at large after Conyers police chase ends in I-20 crash
news.summary: Police are searching for a runaway suspect after an I-20 pursuit linked to a string of early morning hotel car break-ins ended in a collision with an officer's cruiser on Tuesday.
